root_1.name: Landing Page
headings: Your dedicated GPT: Secure, Smart, and Built for Your Organization
Connect Instantly with Your Data Sources
root_1.text:
Your dedicated GPT: Secure, Smart, and Built for Your Organization

Turn complex data into instant decisions with PATGPT.


Request Demo Today
What is PATGPT?
PATGPT is your AI-powered data companion that turns complex Excel sheets and delayed reports into instant dashboards and insights.



This ensures:

Data Isolation – Your information never leaves your system.
Smarter Insights – The more data it learns, the sharper the output.
Your IP – The AI model we build belongs to you, giving a lasting competitive edge.
Get started with AI
How It Works?(3 Steps)

Follow these simple steps to optimize, organize, and share your links with ease.

1
Connect Your Data

Seamlessly link PATGPT to your sales and business databases.

2
Ask with a Prompt

Type your question in plain English—no technical skills needed.

3
Get Instant Answers

Receive ready-to-use reports, and insights in seconds.

Connect Instantly with Your Data Sources

PATGPT integrates effortlessly with the tools you already use.

What It Offers
Show me employee-wise coverage percentage
📊 Here’s a quick summary of employee field work coverage.
• Reshmi Soomary achieved 91%, crossing the top performer threshold. • Most other employees fall in the 50–90% range, showing solid overall coverage with no under-performance.

Sales Trend Analysis
Employee Performance Report
Call Volume Comparison
Chat History & Search

Browse past conversations and quickly find what you need with powerful chat history search.

Connect your datasource

Securely integrate with popular databases like Excel , MySQL, Salesforce, Google Sheets, Power BI to power your AI workflows.

Aug

Interactive graphs & charts

Get Started With PATGPT
Book a Demo
